findings.problem: The clause-by-clause negotiation repeats the same objection/override rhythm across too many turns, so leverage shifts flatten and momentum stalls before the signature phase.
findings.rewrite_direction: Restructure the negotiation around the highest-stakes pivots at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:161, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:173, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:231, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:275; collapse lower-conflict logistics from snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:283 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:291 into brief summary language near snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:297 so the scene reaches signatures with sharper escalation.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised section from snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:161 through snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:317 dramatizes no more than four clause battles and each retained clause produces a distinct leverage shift (new concession, new threat, or new revealed motive). FAIL if three consecutive clauses still follow near-identical proposal/objection/compromise beats.

findings.problem: There is a long screenplay-like run where focalized interiority drops out; the chapter spends over ten consecutive paragraphs in external negotiation before returning to Anika's inner experience.
findings.rewrite_direction: Add concise Anika interior beats at key turns around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:169, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:187, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:205, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:215 (sensation, memory, or self-assessment) so her decision pressure is continuously legible rather than only reappearing at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:221.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised passage spanning snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:153 to snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:221 contains at least three explicit Anika interior beats and no gap longer than six paragraphs without interiority. FAIL if a 10+ paragraph external-only stretch remains.

findings.problem: In the clause block, Priya and Ravi drift into similar policy-heavy syntax and over-formal cadence, which blurs idiolect separation and makes parts of the exchange read like meeting minutes instead of pressured family speech.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise dialogue at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:231, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:237, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:243, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:291 so Priya remains boundary-plainspoken, Ravi remains bargaining/procedural with variable contractions, and Anika's lines stay body-concrete; keep the formal legal register concentrated at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:321 as an intentional contrast.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, in the revised clause-four through clause-eight exchange, each speaker has at least one line whose rhythm and diction are uniquely theirs, and high-pressure turns default to contractions unless a line signals deliberate emphasis/formality. FAIL if Priya and Ravi still deliver three back-to-back interchangeable policy lines.

findings.problem: Stress is repeatedly signaled with the same constructions (face-touch gesture and laugh beats), and the repetition starts to feel mechanical rather than freshly observed.
findings.rewrite_direction: Replace repeated stress templates around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:79, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:195, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:199, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:249, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:293 with varied, consequence-bearing actions tied to the room and props (folder handling, sink posture, badge movement, timing of speech) so each physical beat adds new meaning.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised chapter contains no more than two uses of the same stress-marker construction (e.g., laugh-qualifier or hand-to-face self-soothing) and each remaining gesture changes leverage or reveals new information. FAIL if three or more near-identical stress tics remain.

summary: Chapter 14 lands key causal beats and continuity requirements, but it fails review due to mid-scene pacing flattening, a mandatory interiority drought, dialogue register convergence in the clause block, and repeated stress-gesture prose formulas.
